textByHash.7e992edbf725c94fcbb75f78efeecddefafa5d57: If you're interested in the Fresh Start Worlds, you should know that you can't be an Iron Man on those.
textByHash.67ecde0d3eb5fca9d4b2f60c3bf830242733c2fd: Fresh Start Worlds are worlds that have a fresh economy to build and fresh hiscores to chase.
textByHash.f1a51fbe5aba68759ce97da5b01b35ad5b7d22d9: They're a way to experience Old School RuneScape as if it were new, today!
textByHash.75cc3826c31674df23625205dfc551064164e695: They will last for 6 months, after which your account will be transfered to the main game and you can carry on playing as normal there.
textByHash.24e05e9b67794f9107972144eb146320be4406ea: There is a World First system, which are achievements only obtainable once on all worlds, so you can race against others for these!
textByHash.d4001a101f9772d5a574cff9a944ab684db9da07: If a global race is a bit too much, then there is also an Achievement Point system. You can compete against your friends to get the most points.
textByHash.1cf5b99570fd067b153bd7a3ec0e3ff94ac1cf41: Other than that, it's the same Old School experience you know and love, with all the same content as the main game.
textByHash.ed29aee036e20a52cab8dec9a5a3e0abb34b4ec6: Do you still wish to proceed with selecting an Iron Man mode?
textByHash.321b1de76c8e94d7f5801a9187092f266c6e6e04: That's okay. If you change your mind you can find out more about Fresh Start Worlds by speaking to the Magic Instructor, assuming you're not an ironman.
textByHash.4a90717d5295ab676d0c299b69f9cb2b77e33db9: You'll have to remove any ironman status first by speaking to me.
textByHash.62e6524e62eb0695275928830e0e0b64029ad410: Lovely! You can talk to the Magic Instructor to find out more about Fresh Start Worlds.
